description: Fetch the daily trending leaderboard from Hugging Face Hub. Supports Models, Datasets, and Spaces with multiple sort options (trending, likes, downloads, created, modified, params). Returns ranked items with name, type, parameter size, update time, downloads, and likes. No authentication required.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Content type to fetch trending for: models, datasets, or spaces

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order: trending, likes, downloads, created, modified, params_desc, params_asc

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
